selected_problem_solved: With the listed routine patches inserted, the proof establishes the stronger statement that the realized parameters are exactly \((\sqrt3,\infty)\). As submitted, the lower bound is complete modulo routine leaf-graph/geometric details, and the upper bound is complete modulo the routine expansion of the Sadowsky-band construction and the PL secant-embeddedness lemma.
selector_skipped_reason: N_PARALLEL_RUNS=1 — single run, no selection needed
